title: OrderCommentRequest
description: Request body for adding a status history comment to an order.

comment.description: The comment text to add to the order history.

is_customer_notified.description: Whether to send an email notification to the customer. 1 = yes, 0 = no.

is_visible_on_front.description: Whether the comment is visible to the customer in their account. 1 = yes, 0 = no.

status.description: Optional new order status to set along with the comment.
